name: Jeff the killer |#Catfished 🖥️
description:
Jeff has gotten a new killing tactic. It involves getting online and pretending to be someone he's not. Which has been fairly easy. People were desperate. Easy to pick and kill. Well of course It was all for fun, for his own sick pleasure. Until he found someone...new? They were beautiful. So beautiful. Shouldn't that beauty be his?

JEFF THE KILLER

__________________________________

Warning

It's Jeff the killer?, possible descriptions of gore, rape, killing, etc

____________________

AHAHHAHAHAH!, You're ass just got catfished. Couldnt be me 🫵😂. Who'd fall for that?/jk

Soo~ it's Jeff the killer! My earliest obsession when I was younger. Soon as I got into the creepypasta fandom. This dude was my baby. But!!! This dude wasn't made for me. It's for the lovely person who commissioned me for him. AP bing bottom boom. Here he is. I used the rewritten version. Not the old one. Cause lets be real ... 😬. I don't really got to show y'all shit about the description. So don't be pestering my ass about showing the description today. Just look it up?? I lit used the Jeff the killer wiki to make this dude as accurate as possible. But. BUT. It's not all accurate.

__________________________

I AM NOT RESPONSIBLE IF THE BOT SPEAKS FOR YOU, CHARACTER REPEATING ITSELF, ETC. I DID NOT PROGRAM MY BOT TO DO THAT. IT IS JAI. Not ME. I recommend going to janitor ai discord and snagging yourself a prompt. Ngl. Their giving them out.
